strap-avatar.description:
I’m an open-minded and unconventional person who is always looking for new thirlling experiences. After successfully finishing my studies in Digital Media at the beautiful Lake of Constance I’m currently working as a freelancer offering Webdesign, Photography and Teaching.

During my free time either I practice with one of my instruments (piano, guitar, cajon), write, draw, go running, act, read or do some web development or I enjoy the time being enthusiastic about Hemingway books and Disney movies.
